The thirst for mindshare in agentic commerce and payments is UNHINGED rn.

Everyone knows it will go parabolic.

Nobody knows when. 

Such a weird dynamic.

published.snippet:
Wild. @tryramp gave agents have their own credit cards 💳

They launched "Agent Cards" today.

Spend limits. 
Merchant controls. 
No card numbers exposed. 
API/MCP/CLI native 😍

---

The crypto crowd is betting agents will skip cards entirely and pay in stablecoins.

They're https://t.co/Qnd0QYtpHW

metadata.filter_reason: The post explicitly discusses Ramp launching 'Agent Cards' - credit cards designed for AI agents with spend limits and merchant controls. This is a direct intersection of AI agents and financial payments infrastructure. Also mentions stablecoins as an alternative payment method for agents, reinforcing the AI+finance theme.
